# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2019-04-01'
      name: myKeyVault
      type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
      properties:
        sku: standard
        location: eastus
        tenantId: <tenant_id>
        enableRbacAuthorization: true

    - apiVersion: '2019-04-01'
      name: secret1
      type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets
      dependencies: [myKeyVault]
      properties:
        value: <secret_value>
        attributes:
          tags:
            environment: dev

    - apiVersion: '2019-04-01'
      name: accessPolicy
      type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/accessPolicies
      dependencies: [myKeyVault]
      properties:
        principalId: <app_service_principal_id>
        tenantId: <tenant_id>
        rights:
          secrets:
            - get
            - list

    - apiVersion: '2019-04-01'
      name: accessPolicy2
      type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/accessPolicies
      dependencies: [myKeyVault]
      properties:
        principalId: <service_principal_id>
        tenantId: <tenant_id>
        rights:
          secrets:
            - get
            - list
